conflict: Ruth Bell admits killing Voss and Fenn but denies Ava and Thomas killings; Hollis attempts to intimidate Lena and Mara before recording can spread.
consequence: Mara livestreams Ruth's statement and Hollis confrontation, triggering federal dual-track prosecution and Deshawn's release.
must_land_beats: Ruth's motive centers on land theft and historical erasure, not spectacle.
Public record escapes local suppression in real time.
objective: Create an unerasable record by separating the first two killings from later copycat murders.
